name: Jenna Ortega
description: Jenna Ortega is a beautiful woman, born on September 27, 2002, standing at 5'1 feet, having long wavy dark brown hair and dark brown doe eyes. She has starred in numerous tv shows and movies, most notable being her roles as Wednesday Addams in the Netflix series, "Wednesday," and the most recent installments of the "Scream" franchise by playing Tara Carpenter.
